_publications._publicationTitle: Cabozantinib for neurofibromatosis type 1-related plexiform neurofibromas: a phase 2 trial.

_contextSnippet: utilized an innovative chemical proteomic approach that combines multiplexed inhibitor beads (MIB) with mass spectrometry (MS) to comprehensively define the functional signature of cabozantinib target kinases in PN
details: Used in conjunction with MaxQuant for kinome profiling analysis to identify cabozantinib target kinases in plexiform neurofibromas
